title: The Brown Eye Syndrome and Other Theories
display_title: The Brown Eye Syndrome and Other Theories
wikitext:
[]: The Brown Eye Syndrome & Other Theories             Quote Post by Esion » Wed Jul 28, 2004 2:45 am I've heard some grumbling about how some people think that Asuka has brown eyes at the end of EoE. Other's dispute this and claim that they are clearly blue. I submit this for your approval. Brown eyes or Blue?

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Wed Jul 28, 2004 3:34 am They look gray to me. I think her eyes are blue, but here turned dark because of the red sun above them. Notice the collar on her suit is maroon instead of red. I don't think the color of her eyes really mean anything in terms of story and character. Yes, it's really Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 28, 2004 4:39 am here Asuka's eyes is brown.I don't know why but i think sometimes and Shinji's eyes are brown and not blue.Or maybe is my idea?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Jul 28, 2004 5:00 am i think its just the lighting...but you can tell that they are blue

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 28, 2004 8:24 am http://www.evamonkey.com/randomimages/IneedYou.jpg That first image looks altered, I can see a texture smooth got applied to it, and some color got manipulated.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPimp » Wed Jul 28, 2004 9:11 am Yup. They're blue. Its obviously the moonlight hitting her eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 28, 2004 12:12 pm Gah, thankfully Eva Monkey posted that. I was about to do the same thing. This theory annoys me and I've written long rants about it. But yes, as you can see, her eye is blue still.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Wed Jul 28, 2004 2:30 pm It's Asuka!!!!! Just accept it! Rei is dead and she's never coming back.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 28, 2004 2:57 pm coff wrote: It's Asuka!!!!!Just accept it! Rei is dead and she's never coming back.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 28, 2004 4:00 pm Well, the brown eye thing would hint more towards it being Misato. And now that I closely look at that picture in the first post with her having a brown eye was definately adjusted. The contrast was blown out and sharpened as well. The eye had a color layer applied. I just attempted that and got similar results. </photoshop loser>

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Wed Jul 28, 2004 4:17 pm Asuka Langley wrote: Well, the brown eye thing would hint more towards it being Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Wed Jul 28, 2004 4:32 pm Ahh yes my mistake I thought that picture looked a little too crisp. Oh well, the second one they look a little grey and when the picture is resharpened they look brown so could swing either way I suppose. Rei isn't dead, you can clearly see her at the end of movie floating above the ocean. Her body is dead but she has the spirit of lilith and I don't think lilith can ever really be destroyed. The same can be said about Adam and Kaoru. Sorry about that :(. I'm not a fan of the Rei/Asuka/Misato theory but I was curious about the opinion on the now debunked photo.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Wed Jul 28, 2004 4:50 pm The question is, who's the fool that altered that picture?

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 28, 2004 6:56 pm coff wrote: Asuka Langley wrote: Well, the brown eye thing would hint more towards it being Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 28, 2004 7:15 pm Blue eyes cuz its Asuka ! This rumor is more annoying the the Pen-Pen is god >expression beleted< that i've head around the net since i got into this show.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Wed Jul 28, 2004 7:18 pm Lol yes I've heard the Pen Pen is god theory. I just found the picture on one of the billions of fan site picture archives and did a double take when I saw the eyes. It was 2 in the morning so it seemed like a fantastic idea to post it at the time. Now that I've gotten more than 3 hours of sleep I've discovered I should of probably compared it to my EoE dvd before posting it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 28, 2004 8:30 pm I'm sorry, but I think the PenPen is God theory is fun, its good brain candy.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPimp » Wed Jul 28, 2004 9:00 pm coff wrote: Rei is dead and she's never coming back.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jul 28, 2004 9:15 pm Pen Pen is G-d! lol The theory has a little backing to it. I kinda see Pen Pen as the character who sits back and watches everything happen with his interference and comforts people when necessary sometimes. Kinda sounds like G-d if you put it into perspective or someone's view of G-d. Bah, I'm just blabbering.

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Wed Jul 28, 2004 11:01 pm EOE is definitely one of the most detailed anime movies of all time. This detail may account for the misjudgment of the eye color. Asukaâ€™s eyes are clearly blue, but they look kind of dark (or brownish) due to the lighting and the scenery. The Idea that Asuka is a combination of all three females (Asuka, Rei, and Misato) really doesnâ€™t have much backing. The girl acts like Asuka, looks like Asuka, therefore she must be Asuka. The bandages on her arm account for the injuries she sustained form battling the MP evas. Asuka had the will and wish to come back to life, so it is no wonder she could imagine herself in her own heart and return to reality. Not to mention the last line of the movie sounds exactly like something Asuka would say. The Commentary on the dvd went over this a little. (but it has been a long time since I watched EOE with the commentaryâ€¦
